Attribution is appreciated but not required.

### 2. Commercial License (Closed-Source / Proprietary Use)

If you use this skill (or derivative style systems based on it) to produce

Contact the author for commercial licensing terms.

### Notes

- "Use" covers both the skill text itself and the act of generating

- Images you generate for open/free publications remain yours under the
